title: Reconciliation Text Configuration
description: Schema for config.json files in reconciliation_texts directory

id.description: Maps internal system IDs to numeric identifiers for different partner systems

partner_id.description: Maps partner codes to numeric partner identifiers

test.description: Path to the test file for this reconciliation text

handle.description: Unique identifier for the reconciliation text (lowercase with underscores)

auto_hide_formula.description: Liquid/formula expression to conditionally hide the reconciliation (can be empty)

virtual_account_number.description: Identifier/reference number for the virtual account or tax code

reconciliation_type.description: Defines the reconciliation type for the reconciliation text

public.description: Whether the reconciliation is publicly visible/available

allow_duplicate_reconciliations.description: Whether multiple instances of this reconciliation can be created

is_active.description: Whether this reconciliation is currently active

externally_managed.description: Whether the reconciliation can be edited in the Platform UI or only externally

hide_code.description: Whether to hide the underlying code from users

use_full_width.description: Whether the reconciliation should use full page width in display

downloadable_as_docx.description: Whether the output can be downloaded as a DOCX file

test_firm_id.description: The firm ID to use for the liquid test

text.description: Path to the main Liquid template file

text_parts.description: Maps component names to their Liquid template file paths
